name: Whiskey Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Combine all cake ingredients in a large bowl and mix for 3 minutes.
3. Pour batter into a greased tube pan, filling halfway.
4. In another bowl, melt butter (½ cup) and stir in sugar and whiskey until dissolved and syrupy.
5. Bake the cake mixture for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. While the cake is baking, make the topping by cooking the melted butter, sugar, and whiskey as described above.
7. Once the cake is done, remove it from the oven and let it cool in the pan for 15-20 minutes.
8. Brush the syrup mixture over the top of the cake, then transfer the cake to a wire rack to cool completely.
This version maintains the original recipe's title, ingredients, and instructions while ensuring clarity and consistency.
